name: Department H
text: Give to the James Hudson player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust James Hudson → remove Department H from the game. • Take 2 damage and remove each charge counter on Guardian. Discard this obligation.

name: Master Of The World
text: [[DRONE]] minions get +1 SCH and +1 ATK. [star] Master of the World gets +1 ATK for each acceleration token in play. Forced Interrupt: When Master of the World attacks, resolve his attack against each [[Alpha Flight]] hero. (Guardian's nemesis minion.)

name: Drone Master
text: Permanent. Each facedown encounter card [[DRONE]] minion has base hit points of 1, base SCH of 0, base ATK of 0, and gains the [[Aerial]] trait. Forced Response: After your turn ends, if there is 1 or more threat here, resolve the "Drone Master" ability. Drone Master — Special: Discard the top 2 cards of the encounter deck. Put each treachery discarded this way into play facedown, engaged with you as a [[DRONE]] minion.

name: Alpha Drone
text:
When Revealed: Resolve the 'Drone Master' ability. When Defeated: Resolve the 'Drone Master' ability.
[star] Boost: Place 3 threat on the Drone Master side scheme.

name: Decreasing Gravity
text:
[[Aerial]] characters get +1 ATK and -1 DEF. Action: Discard 2 cards from your hand and the top 5 cards of the encounter deck → draw 2 cards. If the combined cost of those cards is 3 or more, discard this card.
[star] Boost: Place 3 threat on the Drone Master side scheme.

name: Increasing Drones
text:
[[DRONE]] minions get +1 hit point and +1 ATK, and gain retaliate 1. Hero Response: After you defeat a [[DRONE ]]minion, spend 2 resources → discard this card.
[star] Boost: Place 3 threat on the Drone Master side scheme.
